name: com.yoruyomix.unitaskcommandbus
description: A Unity command pattern library that supports lambda-first, progressive class-based extension. Provides UniTask-based async execution with Undo/Redo, 5 async policies (Drop/Sequential/Switch/ThrottleLast/Parallel), and history management.

samples.description: Synchronous commands and basic Invoker<T> usage
Async commands, Cancel, and 5 AsyncPolicy variants
High-intensity mixed API tests: policy × history × undo/redo combinations
Extreme edge-case tests: cross-CTS cancellation, reentrant chains, maxSize=1, ThrottleLast bombing, Undo/Redo interleaving
Regression tests for exception handling: Faulted result, policy flag resets via finally, Sequential/ThrottleLast loop continuation after fault
